title: Command Cockpit Stage Depth Rings
summary: Added bounded parallax depth rings to the Command Cockpit Overview stage so selected money paths feel more like animated game arenas without introducing more scroll or crowding the phone layout.
changes: Rendered three lane-colored depth rings inside the mounted stage atmosphere.
Scoped the visible rings to the Command Cockpit Overview stage while keeping the base component hidden elsewhere.
Tied ring rotation and pulse animation to lane progress and reduced mobile intensity to avoid covering the mission board.
Suppressed the heavier holo floor on narrow cockpit screens so the quest module, stage animation, and footer rail do not collide.
